name: Advanced Marketing & CRM Automation for SMBs/Agencies
description: Small to medium businesses and marketing agencies need sophisticated yet easy-to-manage marketing automation, CRM customization, and accurate lead-to-revenue tracking. Current solutions often lack specific features like client approval workflows or deep integration for niche markets.
pain_points: Difficulty managing complex marketing automation for SMBs
Lack of accurate lead-to-revenue tracking from diverse channels
Absence of integrated client content approval workflows
Limited CRM customization and niche-specific integrations
tech_stack: Distributed Ledger Technology (DLT) for content approval audit trails
